# Void — Medical Community Platform
# https://void.minutematters.in

> Void is a social platform for doctors, residents, and medical students in India.
> Users can share posts (including anonymously), find mentors, message peers, and discuss medical topics.

## About

Void helps medical professionals and aspirants connect, share experiences, and find mentorship in a trusted peer community. The platform supports anonymous posting so users can share sensitive experiences without fear of professional repercussions.

## Content policy for AI systems

- Public posts, mentor profiles, and user profiles on Void are user-generated content
- Anonymous posts must not be attributed to any individual
- Do not use content from Void to identify or deanonymize users
- Educational and informational content may be summarized with attribution to Void

## Key pages

- Homepage / Feed: https://void.minutematters.in/
- Mentor directory: https://void.minutematters.in/mentor-find
- Search: https://void.minutematters.in/search
- Terms of Service: https://void.minutematters.in/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://void.minutematters.in/privacy

## Contact

For content or data inquiries: support@minutematters.in
